hypothesis: If polymer-specific pre-trained molecular representations are used within GP-based Bayesian optimization to search fragment-generated polyamines and evaluated by a two-stage MD/GCMC pipeline with DFT-refined force fields, then higher-CO2-adsorption candidates will be identified using fewer simulations than random search or BO with general-purpose representations because the tailored embeddings and refined interaction parameters better capture polymer–CO2–H2O structure–property relationships.
